welcome.title: Hi, what's your plan for today?
welcome.placeholder: Send a message, upload files, open a folder, or create a scheduled task...
welcome.modelSwitchNotSupported: Model list will be available after first connection. Send a message to connect and load available models.
welcome.quickActionStar: Like us? Give us a star!
welcome.bugReportScreenshotCopied: Screenshot copied — paste it into the issue with Cmd/Ctrl+V.
welcome.bugReportNoScreenshot: Opening a pre-filled GitHub issue — attach a screenshot manually.
welcome.bugReportChooser: Opening the GitHub issue chooser (diagnostics unavailable).

history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
history.exportDialogSingleDescription: Export current topic conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and workspace files into a ZIP package.
history.exportDialogBatchDescription: Export {{count}} selected topics' conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and workspace files into one ZIP package.
history.exportDialogHint: Folder selection follows the same interaction as workspace migration.

historySearch.title: Search conversation content
historySearch.description: Search historical messages by keyword, load more on scroll, and jump to the matched message.

noModelConfigured: No model configured. Please configure in settings.

noModelCta.title: No model configured yet
noModelCta.bodyDesktop: Set one up to start chatting.
noModelCta.bodyRemote: Connect Flux or set up a model on the server to start chatting.
noModelCta.sendTooltip: Connect a model to start sending

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.pasteConfirm_message: Are you sure you want to paste '{{name}}' into the selected folder ({{target}})?
workspace.emptyDescription: Files will appear here after uploading files or opening a folder
workspace.createNewConversation: Create new chat in current workspace

migration.title: Change Workspace
migration.hint: Files will be moved to the new folder, chat history will not be lost
migration.description: Move temporary workspace files to a specified directory
migration.cronMigrationHint: This conversation has scheduled tasks. Do you want to migrate them to the new workspace?

workspace.dragOverlayDesc: Drag files or folders here to copy them into this workspace.
workspace.dragOverlayHint: Tip: drop anywhere to import into the selected folder.
workspace.dragNoFiles: No valid files detected. Please drag from Finder/Explorer.

contextMenu.deleteConfirm: This will delete the file from your system. Continue?
contextMenu.renameTimeout: Rename request timed out, please try again

changes.emptyDescription: File changes will appear here when AI modifies files

terminal.disabled: Terminal mode is off. Enable it in Settings to use the terminal.
terminal.unsupported: This agent has no terminal view yet.
terminal.missingCli: The agent's command-line tool is not installed or not on PATH. Install it, then reopen this tab.
terminal.atCapacity: Too many terminals are open. Close one and try again.
terminal.notFound: This chat could not be found.

chat.noModelSelected: No model selected for current session, cannot send message
chat.quotaExceededBody: The current model quota is exhausted. Switch to {{model}} to continue?
chat.quotaExceededNoFallback: Model quota reached. Please switch to another available model.
chat.apiErrorNoCli: API error occurred. No CLI agent available for fallback.
chat.toolUnsupported: This model can't use tools (Read/Write/Search), which Wayland needs to do work. Pick a tool-capable model from the model picker and try again.

speech.unsupported: Voice input is not available in this environment
speech.recordingUnsupported: Live recording is not supported here. Please upload an audio file instead
speech.authError: Flux key is invalid — reconnect Flux Router to use voice input
speech.premiumLocked: Flux Voice needs a paid Flux plan — upgrade to use dictation
speech.rateLimited: Too many requests — try again shortly
speech.genericError: Voice input failed. Please try again

sideQuestion.title: Side Question
sideQuestion.description: Ask a quick question about the current conversation
sideQuestion.noAnswer: The side question did not have a clear answer in the current conversation.
sideQuestion.parentTaskRunning: Main task still running in the background.
sideQuestion.dismissHint: Press Escape, Enter, or Space to dismiss
sideQuestion.unsupported: Side questions are not available for this conversation.
sideQuestion.alreadyRunning: A side question is already running.
sideQuestion.attachmentsNotAllowed: Side questions cannot include files or DOM snippets.
sideQuestion.emptyQuestion: Please enter a side question after /btw.
sideQuestion.toolsRequired: /btw can only answer questions based on what's already in this conversation. It doesn't have access to search, browse, or fetch new information.
sideQuestion.error: Failed to answer the side question.

commandQueue.title: Queued Commands
commandQueue.editPlaceholder: Update the queued command before it runs.
commandQueue.pausedAfterFailure: The next queued command could not start. Edit, reorder, or remove it to continue.
commandQueue.queueFull: Queue is full. Remove a command before adding more.
commandQueue.inputTooLong: This queued command is too long. Shorten it before sending.
commandQueue.tooManyFiles: Too many files are attached to this queued command.
commandQueue.queueTooLarge: Queue data is too large to persist safely. Remove some queued commands first.

skill_generator.title: Generate Skill/Rule
skill_generator.no_files: No relevant files found in workspace
skill_generator.name_required: Please enter a name for the preset

observability.title: Observability
observability.empty: Activity from this conversation will appear here.

routingBadge.fluxErrorNotice: Flux routing failed for this turn. Check your Flux connection or switch models.

activation.title: Wake your agents
activation.subtitle: Connect a model provider to start running tasks. Pick the path that fits you.

flux.label: Connect Flux Router
flux.sublabel: Free key with a $1 starter credit, no card required. Routes every task to the best-fit specialist model.

ownKey.label: Use my own key
ownKey.sublabel: Bring an API key from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or any of 100+ providers.

claudeCode.label: Use Claude Code
claudeCode.sublabel: Run on your existing Claude Code login, no extra key to manage.

cuaPermission.title: Computer-Use needs macOS permissions
cuaPermission.subtitle: To see your screen and act for you, grant these in System Settings, then re-check.
cuaPermission.relaunchNote: Screen Recording only takes effect after you relaunch Wayland.

acpAuthFailure.title: {{backend}} can't sign in here
acpAuthFailure.subscriptionExplainer: The vendor blocks subscription logins inside third-party tools like this one. To keep using {{backend}} here, route it through Flux Router, add a provider API key, or sign in to the CLI directly.
acpAuthFailure.genericExplainer: {{backend}} could not authenticate. Route it through Flux Router, add a provider API key, or sign in to the CLI to fix this.
acpAuthFailure.wcoreExplainer: Wayland Core could not authenticate. The inference provider rejected the API key (401). Unlike Claude Code, Wayland Core has no subscription sign-in to fall back on, so add a working provider key or route it through Flux Router.

flux.label: Route through Flux
flux.sublabel: Smart routing picks the right model for each task. Start free with a $1 credit, then pay as you go or pick a plan.

addKey.label: Add a {{provider}} API key
addKey.sublabel: Open Settings and paste an API key from your provider console.

cliLogin.label: Sign in to the CLI
cliLogin.sublabel: Run {{cmd}} to sign in with your subscription, then send the message again.

contextCeiling.title: This run exceeded {{model}}’s context window
contextCeiling.titleNoModel: This run exceeded the model’s context window
contextCeiling.explainer: The request grew past the model’s context-window limit and history compaction couldn’t shrink it any further. Switch to a model with a larger context window, then retry the last message.

switch.label: Switch to a larger-context model
switch.sublabel: Pick a model with a bigger context window from the picker.

retry.label: Retry the last message
retry.sublabel: Re-run the message that hit the limit on the selected model.

composerMenu.skillsSub: Only these load by default. Everything else stays one search away.
composerMenu.connectorsSub: Turn a connected MCP server on or off.
composerMenu.toolNudgeOver: {{count}} tools enabled · {{model}} caps at {{cap}}. Scope servers for this chat or switch models.
composerMenu.toolNudgeNear: {{count}} of {{cap}} tools · {{model}}. Near the limit — scope servers or switch models before adding more.

modelSelector.title: Model
modelSelector.subtitle: Pick a model for this chat. Only what you have connected shows.
modelSelector.effortHighDesc: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems
modelSelector.emptySub: Connect a provider to choose a model.
modelSelector.emptyBody: No models yet. Connect a provider or sign in to a CLI.
modelSelector.emptyFlux: Tip: connect Flux Router for one-tap auto-routing across every model you add.
modelSelector.claudeSubscriptionNotice: Claude Code runs on your Claude subscription (Anthropic), so this chat stays on Claude models. To use a different provider like ChatGPT or Gemini, start a new chat and pick that agent.
modelSelector.effortXhighDesc: Maximum reasoning depth for the hardest work
